originalTitle: The best early Amazon Prime Day deals so far
summary: Amazon’s earlier-than-usual Prime Day doesn’t begin until June 23rd, but there are several even earlier deals on must-have products that you can check out right now. To name some examples, Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 are selling at their cheapest-ever price. Also, you can grab Ring’s latest battery-powered doorbell for $60 off and it includes a […]
content: Amazon’s earlier-than-usual Prime Day doesn’t begin until June 23rd, but there are several even earlier deals on must-have products that you can check out right now. To name some examples, Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 are selling at their cheapest-ever price. Also, you can grab Ring’s latest battery-powered doorbell for $60 off and it includes a free Indoor Cam Plus with purchase. While the pre-Prime Day deals are looking good so far, you may not see the brands or products you’re looking for — hopefully, those deals will come later in June. Still, we’ve only included early deals that meet the criteria we hold for all our commerce coverage: they’re good products sold at attractive prices. We’ll update this post frequently ahead of Prime Day. Featured Products Ring Battery Doorbell Plus (second-gen) Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones (second-gen) Govee Table Lamp Classic [Product: Logitech MX Master 3S | https://www.amazon.com/Logitech-Wireless-Ultra-fast-Scrolling-Bluetooth/dp/B09HM94VDS?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Flogitech-mx-master-3s-wireless-usb-a-laser-mouse-with-ultrafast-scrolling-wireless-black%2FJ7H7ZY8XTK, https://logitech.cfzu.net/c/482924/499820/8585?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.logitech.com%2Fen-us%2Fshop%2Fp%2Fmx-master-3s-mac-bluetooth-mouse.910-006569] * The Baseus AM52 10,000mAh power bank that can deliver Qi2.2 25W wireless charging speeds is cheaper than ever for Verge readers. Through June 30th, you can head over to Amazon and use the code THEVERGECODE to nab one for $42.99 — considerably cheaper than the $63.99 price that Prime members have access to. Read about the AM52’s performance here. [Product: Eero Pro 6E tri-band router | https://www.amazon.com/eero-reliable-gigabit-connect-Coverage/dp/B091G65HH6?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Feero-pro-6e-tri-band-mesh-wi-fi-6e-system-3-pack-white%2FJ39QV82L2X, https://www.amazon.com/eero-reliable-gigabit-connect-Coverage/dp/B091G64GVK/?tag=theverge02-20] * Amazon’s Fire 7 Kids tablet is steeply discounted ahead of Prime Day. The 32GB tablet that includes a bumper case, one year of access to a suite of kid-friendly content, and a two-year hardware warranty is down to $64.99 at Amazon (originally $129.99). There’s nothing spectacular about the specs, but it’s a good-enough tablet to withstand whatever your kiddo does to it. The two-year warranty is “worry-free,” which Amazon defines as “if it breaks, we will replace it.” The 16GB version is $54.99. * Amazon’s Fire TV Soundbar Plus that also includes a wireless subwoofer and two satellite speakers is down to $379.99 (originally $489.99), it’s best price to date. It’s a solid sound system if you don’t want to spend a bunch of money. The soundbar supports HDMI eARC and optical audio for inputs, and it can connect to devices via Bluetooth. My interest in this model has been piqued ever since RTINGS named it one of its favorite budget-friendly soundbars. [Product: Govee Outdoor Lamp Post | https://www.amazon.com/Govee-Brightness-Integrated-Waterproof-Assistant/dp/B0DXDY4Y26/?tag=theverge02-20, https://govee.sjv.io/c/482924/3014037/12845?u=https%3A%2F%2Fus.govee.com%2Fproducts%2Fgovee-outdoor-lamp-post-lights%3Fcurrency%3DUSD%26variant%3D44850372542649%26stkn%3De32faa3ec03e%26utm_source%3Dgoogle%26utm_medium%3Dcpc%26utm_campaign%3DPmax_US_OutdoorLights_220721%26ot_source%3Dgoogle%26ot_medium%3Dpaidads%26ot_cam%3D17814189508%26ot_grp%3D%26ot_ad%3D%26gad_source%3D1%26gad_campaignid%3D17814192391%26gbraid%3D0AAAAABQ7EBRz7SHi1_QGFkOvAnuTFsUdY%26gclid%3DCj0KCQjw_rPGBhCbARIsABjq9cdwMEFGmCpuNYm7iKQFnTk6Dolt5v1-j1HtZxTizQlTRr4mm0CRQRIaAqliEALw_wcB] * The 8-piece and 14-piece Ring Alarm Pro home security systems have gotten big discounts ahead of Prime Day. The smaller kit of the two is $209.99 ($90 off) and includes a base station (it doubles as a eero 6 Wi-Fi router), a keypad, four contact sensors for doors or windows, a motion detector, and a range extender for the alarm. The 14-piece set doubles the keypads, contact sensors, and motion detectors. Both include a 30-day trial to Ring Protect plan, which will cost $19.99 per month after the trial. [Product: Ring Battery Doorbell Plus (second-gen) | https://www.amazon.com/Ring-Battery-Doorbell-newest-Nickel/dp/B0GGLS1C4W?ref=amzdv_tplus_dp_dsk_bdldp_B0F14N7HHH_B0GGLS1C4W&tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fring-battery-doorbell-plus-newest-model-retinal-2k-with-wide-angle-video-up-to-6x-zoom-night-vision-and-battery-pack-nickel-silver%2FJ39TLSRS6P%2Fsku%2F6672122, https://ring.pxf.io/c/482924/3022805/30431?u=https%3A%2F%2Fring.com%2Fproducts%2Fbattery-doorbell-plus-2nd-gen%2Fcolor%2Fpolishednightnavy] [Product: Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Select | https://www.amazon.com/amazon-fire-tv-stick-4K-select/dp/B0C6W3D4RM?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Famazon-fire-tv-stick-4k-select-newest-model-streaming-device-streaming-in-4k-ai-powered-search-8gb-free-live-tv-black%2FJ39HW66YJK%2Fsku%2F6644637%3Futm_source%3Dfeed%26extStoreId%3D1510%26ref%3D212%26loc%3D18075457655%26gclsrc%3Daw.ds%26gad_source%3D4%26gad_campaignid%3D18075458606%26gbraid%3D0AAAAAD-ORIhSHlGddVnEnW-FqCuPzbvlO%26gclid%3DCjwKCAiAnoXNBhAZEiwAnItcG1TbZE0MTq67hM72gyLFTn2VMnbAmssKQxlB13LpRrmNnprahLMKVBoCL8oQAvD_BwE, https://goto.target.com/c/482924/81938/2092?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.target.com%2Fp%2Famazon-fire-tv-stick-4k-select-with-ai-powered-search-and-free-live-tv-2025%2F-%2FA-91651395%23lnk%3Dsametab] * Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 have been available at their lowest price to date for the past week or so. Originally $249, the noise-canceling, wireless earbuds are $179 at Amazon and Best Buy — no membership required. Walmart has a product page that lists $169 as a sale price, though it’s out of stock at th
chineseTitle: 迄今为止最好的亚马逊 Prime Day 早期优惠
chineseSummary: 亚马逊的 Prime Day 比平常更早，要到 6 月 23 日才开始，但您现在就可以查看一些更早的必备产品优惠。举几个例子，苹果的 AirPods Pro 3 的售价是有史以来最便宜的。此外，您还可以以 60 美元的折扣购买 Ring 最新的电池供电门铃，其中包括一个 [...]
chineseContent: 亚马逊的 Prime Day 比平常更早，要到 6 月 23 日才开始，但您现在就可以查看一些更早的必备产品优惠。举几个例子，苹果的 AirPods Pro 3 的售价是有史以来最便宜的。此外，您还可以以 60 美元的折扣购买 Ring 最新的电池供电门铃，并且购买时还包括免费的 Indoor Cam Plus。虽然到目前为止，Prime Day 前的优惠看起来不错，但您可能看不到您正在寻找的品牌或产品 - 希望这些优惠能在 6 月晚些时候推出。尽管如此，我们只收录了符合我们所有商业报道标准的早期交易：它们是以有吸引力的价格出售的好产品。我们将在 Prime 会员日之前经常更新这篇文章。特色产品 环形电池门铃 Plus（第二代） Bose QuietComfort Ultra 耳机（第二代） Govee 台灯 Classic [产品：Logitech MX Master 3S | https://www.amazon.com/Logitech-Wireless-Ultra-fast-Scrolling-Bluetooth/dp/B09HM94VDS?tag=theverge02-20， https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Flogitech-mx-master-3s-wireless-usb-a-laser-mouse-with-ultrafast-scrolling-wireless-black%2FJ7H7ZY8XTK， https://logitech.cfzu.net/c/482924/499820/8585?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.logitech.com%2Fen-us%2Fshop%2Fp%2Fmx-master-3s-mac-bluetooth-mouse.910-006569] * 倍思 AM52 10,000mAh 移动电源对于 Verge 读者来说，Qi2.2 25W 无线充电速度比以往任何时候都便宜。截至 6 月 30 日，您可以前往亚马逊并使用代码 THEVERGECODE 以 42.99 美元的价格购买一件，比 Prime 会员的 63.99 美元价格便宜得多。请在此处了解 AM52 的性能。 【产品：Eero Pro 6E 三频路由器 | https://www.amazon.com/eero-reliable-gigabit-connect-Cov
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
